This '''battlecruiser''' was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Mulchive Wermis]] following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Characteristics==
Significant aspects of the ship included five primary thrusters and four [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] globes, distinguishing the design from the three primary thrusters and two globes of [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]]. Also unlike the more common Star Destroyers, the main reactor was small enough relative to the rest of the ship to not protrude from the ventral hull. Additionally, the ship had extensive armor plating compared to smaller vessels.

==History==
[[File:Wermis_tractorbeam.jpg|thumb|left|180px|The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Battlecruiser/Legends|battlecruiser]] reels in the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']].]]

Some time after [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Yavin]], the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] used a [[Battlecruiser/Legends|battlecruiser]] as his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] while the [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] was being constructed in the [[Fondor system/Legends|Fondor system]]. The vessel participated in the blockade of the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]] and would also ferry Vader to numerous galactic locations.

Captain Wermis served as commanding officer under Vader and was in charge when the Dark Lord was not on-board. He managed to capture the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] during a mission to [[Monastery/Legends|Monastery]], but subsequently lost it due to his incompetence.

==Behind the scenes==
Certain aspects of early ''Executor'' production art would be used to render this ship, as well as [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mils Giel]]'s [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Helmsman (battlecruiser)|''Helmsman'']].

[[File:Executor_prototype.jpg|thumb|right|180px|Early [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] production art. Note the terrace structure, similar to the one on [[Mulchive Wermis|Wermis's]] battlecruiser.]]
